Dialog.name: Item_101

Dialog.name: Item_103

Dialog.name: Item_104

Dialog.name: Item_105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Skill Card that bestows Ali Dance: Lower hit rate of incoming attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Skill Card that bestows Firm Stance: Halves damage, but can't dodge.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Skill Card that bestows Spell Master: Halves SP cost of magic skills.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_108

Dialog.name: Item_10B

Dialog.name: Item_10C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Skill Card that bestows Endure: Survive a fatal blow with 1 HP.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10D

Dialog.name: Item_10E

Dialog.name: Item_10F

Dialog.name: Item_112
